rawMessage: Product: Invalid value in field 'priceCurrency'. The value provided for priceCurrency is not a valid ISO 4217 currency code. Value: 'USDT'
recommendedFix: Map crypto currency codes (USDT, BTC, ETH, etc.) to valid ISO 4217 codes. USDT/USDC/stablecoins → USD. Other crypto → USD as approximate denomination. Add toIsoCurrency() helper to seo.ts and call it wherever priceCurrency is set.
validationSteps: Run: node -e "const {toIsoCurrency}=await import('./src/utils/seo.ts'); console.log(toIsoCurrency('USDT'))" — should output USD
Check dist/exchanges/bybit/index.html — grep for priceCurrency, value must be 'USD' not 'USDT'
Paste any exchange page URL into Google Rich Results Test — no currency errors
fixDescription: Added toIsoCurrency() helper to src/utils/seo.ts mapping USDT/USDC/BTC/ETH etc. → 'USD'. Updated buildProductSchema() to call toIsoCurrency(ex.bonusCurrency) for all priceCurrency fields. Updated bonus-codes/[slug].astro to import and use toIsoCurrency().
notes: USDT is pegged 1:1 to USD so mapping to 'USD' is semantically accurate. The original crypto currency name is preserved in the Offer.description field for display purposes.
